text.message: red will you trade me a road if i give you 4 11
red we gonna be petty all game here or what
it's not petty at all you got an insane setup double ports with both resources covered
do you not see oj setup lol
did a good job painting my "insane setup"
you want a sticker or something
he literally has to block me or oj
bro got played like a fiddle
you can see by the speed he did the block I hurt his feelings
9 messages in a row... maybe give the keyboard a rest
now black knows he wants me to lose
but he also knows oj will win
he decided he's gonna risk it
blue is trying to prove a point: this is a social game
so he can steal from oj now
meh at least I didn't report blue for nothing
